overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through Manhattan streets at night. The scene features urban architecture with snow patches on the ground, pedestrians in winter clothing, street lighting, and vehicles including a garbage truck and city bus. The atmosphere is cool-toned with artificial lighting from street lamps and building windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with retail storefronts and subway entrance

events.description: passing by a clothing store with illuminated mannequin displays in the window

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and storefronts, approaching a subway entrance

entered.detail: Large white delivery truck parked along the curb
Red brick building with warm yellow wall-mounted sconce lights
Storefront with glass windows showing mannequins and folded clothes on shelves
Green painted metal railing and stairs leading down to subway

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing a white box truck and a brick building with warm lighting. The character moves past a clothing store with mannequin displays and approaches a green subway entrance. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions on the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and historic architecture

events.description: crossing the street as a garbage truck drives through the intersection
moving from open intersection to sidewalk alongside historic building with large arched windows

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the street at a crosswalk, navigating around the garbage truck and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: garbage truck driving through the intersection with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: Large dark-colored sanitation truck with illuminated red taillights
Brownstone building with large arched windows and warm interior lighting
Traffic signal showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider intersection as Spider-Man crosses the street, sharing the crosswalk with a garbage truck and other pedestrians. The character passes alongside a historic brownstone building with large arched windows. The traffic light shows red as vehicles wait at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk with newsstand and political campaign billboard

events.description: passing green newsstand kiosk with 'OSBORN A NEW YORK' campaign billboard above
crossing street at Barclay Street intersection with traffic light turning green

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking past a newsstand and crossing another street intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two women in business attire walking and conversing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Green metal newsstand with 'OUR' signage and WiFi advertisement
Large illuminated billboard displaying 'OSBORN A NEW YORK' with portrait
Street sign indicating Barclay Street mounted on traffic light pole

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a busier sidewalk section featuring a distinctive green newsstand and a large political campaign billboard for Osborn. The crowd density increases with pedestrians in winter clothing. The character crosses another street at the Barclay Street intersection as the traffic light changes to green.

scene_state.functional_zone: quieter street with restaurant storefronts and autumn trees

events.description: passing 'WILBURYS' restaurant sign and entering tree-lined street section
character transitions from walking to jogging pace

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man transitions from walking to jogging down a quieter street lined with autumn trees and storefronts

entered.detail: Hanging sign for 'WILBURYS' restaurant with illuminated lettering
Line of deciduous trees with orange and brown autumn foliage along the sidewalk
Wooden park bench positioned in front of the restaurant

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Spider-Man moving into a quieter street section featuring the 'WILBURYS' restaurant and a line of autumn trees with orange foliage. The crowd thins out significantly, and the character gradually accelerates from walking to jogging. Tall office buildings with illuminated windows rise in the background against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Manhattan night, transitioning from a narrow commercial sidewalk into a wide urban intersection and finally toward a quieter, tree-lined street. It begins with Spider-Man walking past a white box truck and a warm-lit clothing store before approaching a green subway entrance. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the character crosses the street alongside a garbage truck and a historic brownstone building. The environment then shifts toward a busier pedestrian zone featuring a green newsstand and a large Osborn campaign billboard, moving through the Barclay Street intersection as the traffic light turns green. Finally, the crowd thins out as the camera follows the character past the Wilburys restaurant and orange autumn trees, with the pace accelerating into a jog against a backdrop of illuminated office buildings.
